scripts.cli:build: cd packages/cli-core && npm run build && cd ../sdk && npm run build && cd ../cli && npm run build
scripts.cli:test: cd packages/cli-core && npm run test && cd ../sdk && npm run test && cd ../cli && npm run test
scripts.cli:typecheck: cd packages/cli-core && npm run typecheck && cd ../sdk && npm run typecheck && cd ../cli && npm run typecheck
